description: Diagnostics/data-only bakeoff for MLX SAM3 box prompts derived from the current 7-anchor cube mesh face boxes.

prompts.prompt: top visible face of the Rubik's cube
left visible face of the Rubik's cube
right visible face of the Rubik's cube
colored sticker squares on the Rubik's cube
black plastic grid lines between stickers

bakeoff.description: Diagnostics-only bakeoff harness for SAM3/Falcon-style promptable segmentation masks as vertex and face-rectification signals.

falcon.notes: Open-vocabulary detection/segmentation candidate; external masks keep the repo dependency-free.

sam3.notes: Promptable segmentation candidate; direct adapter intentionally not wired until local package/API is stable.
